caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or an interview for "Boss Talk 101," as indicated by the logo in the bottom right corner. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, possibly personal space, with framed photographs on the wall behind him and a clothing store visible through a glass partition. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with expressive facial movements. The environment suggests a relaxed yet professional atmosphere, combining elements of a studio with a retail backdrop.
